polar and equatorial radii for Neptune's 1-bar isobaric surface. models are described in Mankovich et al. 2026, PSJ.
these models assume the k-band 2014 wind profile from Tollefson et al. (2018, Icarus 311).
the distribution of models in this file comes from randomly drawing wind fit coefficients from Gaussians with means and standard deviations from Table 1 (polynomial profiles).
